message:
fix(explorer): sort turns by response time with single timestamp per turn

- Sort turns by response timestamp (when completed) instead of request time
- Move timestamp to turn header level instead of individual messages
- Ensures timestamps always progress forward down the page
- Fixes visual "time going backwards" with parallel requests

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,15 +21,17 @@

Session: {{.SessionID}}

{{range .Turns}}
+
+ {{if .Response}}{{.Response.Meta.Timestamp.Format "15:04:05.000"}}{{else if .Request}}{{.Request.Meta.Timestamp.Format "15:04:05.000"}}{{end}} + {{.ReqParsed.Model}} + #{{.Seq}} + {{if .RequestID}}{{.RequestID}}{{end}} +
{{if .Request}}
User - {{.Request.Meta.Timestamp.Format "15:04:05.000"}} - {{.ReqParsed.Model}} - #{{.Seq}} - {{if .RequestID}}{{.RequestID}}{{end}}
{{if .ReqParsed.System}} @@ -93,7 +95,6 @@

Session: {{.SessionID}}

Assistant - {{.Response.Meta.Timestamp.Format "15:04:05.000"}} {{if .RespParsed.Usage.OutputTokens}} {{.RespParsed.Usage.InputTokens}} in / {{.RespParsed.Usage.OutputTokens}} out {{end}}
